visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a large warehouse retail environment with towering shelves filled with plastic-wrapped pallets. A person, visible from the chest down, wears a blue long-sleeved shirt and black shorts. They are holding a vibrant, stylized lion dance head plush pillow in front of their upper body, shaking it rhythmically to mimic a traditional lion dance. (2) The camera cuts to two women standing in the warehouse aisle. One woman on the left has long dark hair and wears a black dress; the woman on the right wears a purple sweater, a grey fuzzy bucket hat, and holds a white and gold lion pillow. They are both smiling and looking directly at the camera while speaking. (3) The woman in the purple sweater demonstrates a hand-pocket feature on the back of the lion pillow, sliding her hands inside to show its functionality. The background remains consistent with high-set industrial shelving and bright warehouse lighting. (4) Both women hold their respective pillows (red and white/gold) and perform a playful, synchronized dance, moving the pillows up and down. Their facial expressions are joyful and high-energy. The video concludes with them holding the products and posing towards the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 咚咚鏘咚咚鏘. (2) [Subtitle]: 竟然有醒獅抱枕. [Slogan]: 699元. [Slogan]: 一個金一個紅. (3) [Subtitle]: 太旺了吧！ [Subtitle]: 放在家裡醒過來. [Slogan]: 699元一個. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且手還可以插進去. [Subtitle]: 觸感也滿好的. (5) [Subtitle]: 還可以. [Variety]: 突然就想要跳醒獅. (6) [Variety]: 咚咚鏘. [Subtitle]: 我覺得過年拿真的是非常. [Variety]: 適合拜年. (7) [Variety]: 給我紅包！ [Variety]: 恭喜發財.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a black outfit. The other wears a light purple knit sweater and a grey/white fuzzy bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high-reaching metal racks, pallets wrapped in plastic, and industrial concrete flooring.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a rhythmic, high-energy percussion track featuring traditional Chinese drums and cymbals. A female voice loudly chants 'Dong Dong Qiang' in synchronization with the beat. The pitch is high and the tone is celebratory. (2) A sharp transition occurs as the percussive music settles into a lower-volume background bed. Two female voices begin a fast-paced conversation in Mandarin, expressing excitement about a product. Their speech rate is high, and the delivery is clearly articulated and professional. (3) A bright 'sparkle' or 'ding' sound effect is heard as they discuss the price and features of the pillows. The music maintains a constant, upbeat tempo under the vocals. (4) The audio track ends with a repeat of the 'Dong Dong Qiang' vocal chant accompanied by an increased volume of cymbals, marking a high-energy conclusion to the demonstration. The signal remains exceptionally clean throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Feature Highlight -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific seasonal product—lion dance plush pillows—available at Costco. It uses a high-energy, festive theme aligned with Lunar New Year traditions to capture viewer attention and demonstrate product features in an entertaining way.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of price and visual display of product within a Costco warehouse environment with the company logo prominently featured.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly effective short-form commercial that leverages cultural trends and retail exclusivity to drive consumer interest.
